# 2nd St Strategy

> 2nd St Strategy is a boutique commercial due diligence and growth strategy
> firm built for middle-market private equity. Principal-led by James Agres,
> primary-research-first, and AI-integrated. Based in Chicago, IL and serving
> PE sponsors nationally.

## What we do

- Commercial due diligence (CDD) for buy-side and sell-side private equity
  transactions in the middle market.
- Growth strategy for portfolio companies (market sizing, segmentation,
  pricing, customer voice-of-market, competitive positioning).
- AI analytics for PE: custom tools and dashboards that synthesize public and
  proprietary data sources to accelerate diligence and strategy work.
- Voice-of-market research: B2B and B2C primary research with customers,
  former customers, channel partners, competitors, and topical experts.

## Who we serve

- Middle-market private equity sponsors (lower- and core-middle-market funds)
- PE-backed portfolio company management teams
- Independent sponsors and family offices doing direct deals
- Strategic acquirers evaluating bolt-on opportunities

## Key facts

- Founded by James Agres, principal and former senior consultant at top-tier
  strategy firms with 15+ years of experience in commercial due diligence and
  growth strategy.
- 200+ buy-side and sell-side private equity processes supported.
- 3,000+ expert and customer interviews conducted across engagements.
- 80+ B2B and B2C surveys executed.
- 15+ proprietary AI analytics tools developed for internal CDD work.
- Sectors: industrial / B2B services, business services, consumer services,
  healthcare services, software, building products, and more.

## Related products

- PinpointIQ (https://pinpointiq.app) is a geographic market intelligence
  platform built by 2nd St Strategy for PE firms backing location-based
  roll-ups. It provides MSA-level market sizing, competitive density, and
  white-space mapping across 30+ verticals and 900+ U.S. markets.
